turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Booking a table at a restaurant 🗨️ “Hi, I’d like to book a table for two tonight.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! What time would you like the table for tonight?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Well, I want to book a table at a restaurant. I want to book from 1 p.m. to 4 p.m.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! Do you have any specific dietary preferences or favorite dishes that you’d like us to keep in mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I have four friends. One is vegan and one can't eat any peanuts because she is allergic to it.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, that’s really helpful to know! We’ll make sure to have vegan options available and keep everything peanut-free for your friend. Is there anything else we should consider for the group?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Please sit near the windows if possible.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, I’ll make sure to arrange a window seat for you all. Anything else you’d like to add to the reservation?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I'm booking for my friend's birthday because my friend is like having a birthday and we could like celebrate together with Christmas and could we bring our own cake for the celebrations?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That sounds wonderful! We can definitely note the birthday celebration for your friend. And yes, you’re welcome to bring your own cake. Is there anything else we can do to make it extra special?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Do you have the confirmation message for this one?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! I’ll send you a confirmation message with all the details shortly. Is there a preferred contact method for that confirmation?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I'm looking forward to it. Well, do the kitchen close earlier or could we still order desserts if we stay after 4pm?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s definitely something we can check on! Typically, the kitchen stays open for orders until a bit later, but I’ll make sure to confirm that for you.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, sounds good! Have a wonderful day, and I’ll see you soon!
